diagrams.title: Cloud Service Models Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Inverted pyramid showing relationship between IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS
elements: Customer responsibility increases from top to bottom
Provider responsibility decreases from top to bottom
diagrams.purpose: Understanding responsibility division and service model hierarchy

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models
diagrams.description: Four deployment models showing different cloud infrastructure types
elements: Public Cloud - shared by general public
Private Cloud - dedicated to single organization
Hybrid Cloud - combination of public and private
Community Cloud - shared by organizations with common interests
diagrams.purpose: Differentiating deployment models and their use cases

diagrams.title: NIST Cloud Characteristics
diagrams.description: Five essential characteristics of cloud computing

diagrams.title: Cloud Computing Architecture
diagrams.description: High-level architecture showing cloud components and interaction
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how cloud systems are structured and components interact
